underlying: Republican margin of victory, 2026 Louisiana U.S. Senate general election (Nov 3, 2026). Incumbent Cassidy (R) facing closed-primary challenge from Letlow.
method: Anchor: 2020 Cassidy won jungle primary outright with 60.7% (40+pt margin). 2024 Trump won LA by ~22pts. KEY: Cassidy likely loses R closed primary to Letlow (Trump+Landry endorsed; Mar 2026 American Pulse poll Letlow 31, Fleming 25, Cassidy 21). Whoever wins R primary should win general by Trump-like margin in solidly R state. Modeled R margin ~ N(19, 6).
notes: First closed-primary cycle since 2010 (was jungle primary). Trump and Landry endorsed Letlow; Cassidy in trouble in primary after his Trump-impeachment vote. General: LA Trump+22 in 2024; D bench weak; whoever wins R primary should crush. Older Senate margins: Cassidy 2014 (open) +12 runoff vs Landrieu, 2020 +40 jungle. Wider distribution if Cassidy somehow survives primary (he runs ~10pts weaker than Letlow). Center estimate ~19 reflecting Trump-margin (~22) minus small D-environment haircut. Kalshi YES asks: P11 0.89, P15 0.73, P19 0.58, P21 0.50, P23 0.42 — market median ~21. Model slightly under market.
